steps: refunds issued directly by a support agent
refund over $500 routed to the finance team for approval
finance reviews eligibility and the original payment method
page the on-call engineer via PagerDuty
open a #incident channel
escalate to the engineering manager if not acknowledged
discounts above 20% require approval from the VP of Sales
discounts above 40% require the CFO to sign off
record every exception in the deal desk spreadsheet
employees request PTO in the HR portal
the direct manager approves or declines
submit receipts in Expensify within 30 days
expenses higher than $75 need manager approval
create the workspace and send the welcome email
schedule a kickoff call within 3 business days
assign a customer success manager
verify identity and locate all records by tenant id
delete from primary stores and backups within 30 days
send written confirmation once complete
merge to main triggers CI and a green build is required
deploys roll to 10% of traffic behind a feature flag
new vendors over $10k require a security review
approval from the head of finance
every change needs one approving review and a green CI run
security-sensitive changes require review from the security owner
agents issue refunds up to $500 in the admin panel
larger refunds go to finance with the order id
submit chargeback evidence through the payment provider dashboard
